John Doe — Senior Data Engineer

SKILLS
Python, SQL, Spark, Flink, Kafka, distributed systems, data pipelines, Airflow

EXPERIENCE
Staff Data Engineer at Google (2021–present)
  Built a streaming data platform processing 10TB/day using Spark and Kafka.

Senior Data Engineer at Amazon (2018–2021)
  Led migration to Spark on EMR, reducing processing costs by 40%.

EDUCATION

BS Computer Science, UC Berkeley, 2016
